data.keyword: lions mane salt scrub for face and body

result.keyword: lions mane salt scrub for face and body

items.markdown:
Lion's mane salt scrubs are designed to exfoliate and nourish the skin by combining mineral-rich salts with the antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits of **Lion's Mane mushroom extract** . These scrubs are primarily used to improve skin texture, support collagen production, and provide deep hydration.[[1]](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-lions-mane-scrub-8-oz?srsltid=AfmBOopE2O0bHE_871-01kdbqIzK25yA2ql5bS_p76j5zBzgE0d1tR_6#:~:text=$24.00%20USD,per%20week%20for%20best%20results.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6627771179973779464,catalogid:8916746914933518999,gpcid:10023773780186035872&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://moonandskin.com/blogs/glow-up/discovering-the-lions-mane-mushroom-benefits-for-skin-natures-hidden-gem?srsltid=AfmBOoqvjhD1TuIZ5st90HEseVct4URyfCmZwyj7k35j9odeJPLJv-YT#:~:text=By%20incorporating%20lion's%20mane%20into%20our%20skincare%20regimen%2C%20we%20can,the%20effects%20of%20sun%20exposure.)[[4]](https://skintherapy.com/from-the-forest-to-your-face-how-mushrooms-are-revolutionizing-skincare/#:~:text=Lion's%20Mane:%20This%20mushroom%20contains,to%20help%20support%20healthy%20skin.)

Benefits for Face and Body

- **Exfoliation and Renewal** : Mineral-rich Sea, Himalayan, or Dead Sea salts gently polish away dead skin cells to reveal smoother, more radiant skin underneath.
- **Anti-Aging Support** : Lion's Mane mushroom contains polysaccharides and antioxidants that may boost **collagen and elasticity** , helping to reduce the appearance of fine lines.
- **Soothing Inflammation** : Its anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce redness, calm irritation, and support natural skin healing.
- **Hydration** : Formulations often include nourishing oils like **sweet almond and jojoba oil** , which lock in moisture and leave the skin feeling soft.[[1]](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-lions-mane-scrub-8-oz?srsltid=AfmBOopE2O0bHE_871-01kdbqIzK25yA2ql5bS_p76j5zBzgE0d1tR_6#:~:text=$24.00%20USD,per%20week%20for%20best%20results.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6627771179973779464,catalogid:8916746914933518999,gpcid:10023773780186035872&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.instagram.com/p/DVMTWhEDlSg/#:~:text=%E2%9C%A8%20BUY%204%2C%20GET%202,saltability)[[4]](https://eatfungies.com/blogs/news/perfect-your-skincare-routine-with-lion-s-mane?srsltid=AfmBOorDwjG0ATx5bAHrjak0vmm5O2XXeOEENFyGHgbpsxNgt9xVJJ2D#:~:text=Cheat%20Sheet,fight%20inflammation%20before%20it%20starts.)[[5]](https://skintherapy.com/from-the-forest-to-your-face-how-mushrooms-are-revolutionizing-skincare/#:~:text=Lion's%20Mane:%20This%20mushroom%20contains,to%20help%20support%20healthy%20skin.)[[6]](https://moonandskin.com/blogs/glow-up/discovering-the-lions-mane-mushroom-benefits-for-skin-natures-hidden-gem?srsltid=AfmBOoqvjhD1TuIZ5st90HEseVct4URyfCmZwyj7k35j9odeJPLJv-YT#:~:text=By%20incorporating%20lion's%20mane%20into%20our%20skincare%20regimen%2C%20we%20can,the%20effects%20of%20sun%20exposure.)

Recommended Products

The following products incorporate Lion's Mane mushroom into exfoliating salt-based formulas:[[1]](https://www.midwestseasaltcompany.com/exfoliating-lions-main-mushroom-scrub-128oz/)

[![Himalayan Salt Lion's Mane Scrub](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161257-4353-0139-0000-f13017828fb5:4)
Himalayan Salt Lion's Mane Scrub $24.00 Saltability](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:14355365782867049316,gpcid:10023773780186035872,headlineOfferDocid:4724190994376421910,catalogid:8916746914933518999,productDocid:6627771179973779464&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiiucGuoaSTAxX4mGoFHehCGZMQgLcPegQICBAC) Ask about

- **Features** : Formulated with Sea Salt, Himalayan Salt, and Lion’s Mane extract.
- **Additional Ingredients** : Contains a blend of sweet almond oil, jojoba oil, oat extract, arnica, and Vitamin E.
- **Usage** : Recommended to mix with a small amount of water to create a paste and massage onto damp skin 2–3 times per week.
- Available at [Saltability](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-lions-mane-scrub-8-oz).

[![Exfoliating Lions Main Mushroom Scrub](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161257-4353-0139-0000-f13017828fb5:5)
Exfoliating Lions Main Mushroom Scrub $57.03 Walmart - The Midwest Sea Salt Company & more](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,mid:576462878899398168,imageDocid:6383926006675907478,headlineOfferDocid:15373118500153604702,catalogid:4621011338833908465,productDocid:298150119403178508&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiiucGuoaSTAxX4mGoFHehCGZMQgLcPegQICBAQ) Ask about

- **Features** : A Dead Sea Salt-based scrub designed to balance and refresh skin.
- **Scents** : Available in various scents including **Lemongrass**, **Peppermint** , and **Lavender** , as well as an unscented version.
- **Size** : Offered in a large 128 oz (1 gallon) tub suitable for heavy users or professional settings.
- Available at [The Midwest Sea Salt Company](https://www.midwestseasaltcompany.com/exfoliating-lions-main-mushroom-scrub-128oz/) and Walmart.[[1]](https://www.midwestseasaltcompany.com/exfoliating-lions-main-mushroom-scrub-128oz/#:~:text=Product%20Description,Choose%20Options)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6627771179973779464,catalogid:8916746914933518999,gpcid:10023773780186035872&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-lions-mane-scrub-8-oz?srsltid=AfmBOopE2O0bHE_871-01kdbqIzK25yA2ql5bS_p76j5zBzgE0d1tR_6#:~:text=$24.00%20USD,per%20week%20for%20best%20results.)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:298150119403178508,catalogid:4621011338833908465,mid:576462878899398168&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7297618303635761298,catalogid:9786592570481028313&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:11995534751749398251,catalogid:7286353642936147147,gpcid:4756473384681669255,mid:576462878899398168&ibp=oshop)[[7]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8000089833852050309,catalogid:8960174552859667425&ibp=oshop)

Safety and Usage Considerations

- **Skin Sensitivity** : While generally considered safe for most, some users may experience a **skin rash** ; it is advisable to patch test first.
- **Medical Warnings** : Individuals with **auto-immune diseases** (like lupus or MS) or **bleeding conditions** should consult a doctor before use, as Lion's Mane may stimulate the immune system or slow blood clotting.
- **Exfoliation Method** : When using on the face, use gentle, circular motions to avoid micro-tears, especially with salt-based abrasives.[[1]](https://www.webmd.com/vitamins/ai/ingredientmono-1536/lions-mane-mushroom#:~:text=When%20taken%20by%20mouth:%20Lion's,symptoms%20of%20auto-immune%20diseases.)[[2]](https://www.mskcc.org/cancer-care/integrative-medicine/herbs/lions-mane-mushroom#:~:text=What%20is%20it?,Skin%20rash)[[3]](https://www.instagram.com/p/DVMTWhEDlSg/#:~:text=%E2%9C%A8%20Salon%20Range%20Creamy%20Face,NaturalSkincare%20%23SelfCareRituals%20%23GlowNaturally%20%23SandalwoodAndChamomile)[[4]](https://www.midwestseasaltcompany.com/exfoliating-lions-main-mushroom-scrub-128oz/#:~:text=Product%20Description,Choose%20Options)
